mapper.select: SELECT id, order_number, user_id, consumer_name, consumer_phone, consumer_email, address, memo, status, total_price, created_at FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, order_number, user_id, consumer_name, consumer_phone, consumer_email, address, memo, status, total_price, created_at FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT oi.id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, oi.price_at_order, p.name AS product_name, p.file_group_id FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_number, user_id, consumer_name, consumer_phone, consumer_email, address, memo, status, total_price) VALUES (#{orderNumber}, #{userId}, #{consumerName}, #{consumerPhone}, #{consumerEmail}, #{address}, #{memo}, 'pending', #{totalPrice}) RETURNING id, order_number, user_id, consumer_name, consumer_phone, consumer_email, address, memo, status, total_price, created_at
INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, product_id, quantity, price_at_order) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{priceAtOrder}) RETURNING id, order_id, product_id, quantity, price_at_order
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_number, user_id, consumer_name, consumer_phone, consumer_email, address, memo, status, total_price, created_at FROM orders ORDER BY created_at DESC
